headline: Western Digital Refocuses On HDDs As AI Storage Demand Locks In Capacity
summary: Western Digital (NasdaqGS:WDC) has separated from its flash memory business, becoming a pure-play hard disk drive company focused on high-capacity storage for the AI era. The company reports its HDD production capacity is already sold out through 2028 under long term agreements with major cloud providers. Western Digital recently completed a US$3.1b stake sale and redeemed its senior notes, steps that are intended to strengthen its balance sheet and financial flexibility. Management is...

headline: Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller Sells Sandisk Stock and Buys an AI Stock Up 223,000% Since Its IPO
summary: Stanley Druckenmiller sold a soaring semiconductor stock and bought Amazon in the fourth quarter.
